# Subscriptions.IsRequestScopedNotificationMethod method

Returns `true` when *method* is a request-scoped (progress/logging) kind (R-10.6-a).

```csharp
public static bool IsRequestScopedNotificationMethod(string method)
```

| parameter | description |
| --- | --- |
| method | The notification method name. |

## Return Value

`true` when it is request-scoped.
